LAZYMUSIC.Settings.YouTubeApiKeyHint: API key from Google Cloud Console with YouTube Data API v3 enabled.
LAZYMUSIC.Settings.SyncToPlayersHint: Broadcast GM playback to all connected players.
LAZYMUSIC.Settings.ServerUrlHint: Usually NOT needed: the module's built-in helper is used automatically (launch Foundry via the "Foundry VTT (with music)" shortcut). Set this only as a fallback — the "My Music" server address as players see it (e.g. http://26.x.x.x:8765 over Radmin).
LAZYMUSIC.NeedApiKey: Set your YouTube API key in module settings
LAZYMUSIC.ChoosePlaylist: Pick a playlist or search for tracks
LAZYMUSIC.ClearCacheTooltip: Clear downloaded music cache on disk
LAZYMUSIC.CacheEmpty: Lazy Music: cache is already empty.
LAZYMUSIC.CacheConfirm: Delete downloaded music from disk? The cache holds {files} files ({mb} MB). Tracks will re-download next time they are played.
LAZYMUSIC.CacheError: Lazy Music: failed to clear cache — {error}
LAZYMUSIC.HelperDownCache: Lazy Music: the helper is not running — nothing to clear the cache with. Launch Foundry via the "Foundry VTT (with music)" shortcut.
LAZYMUSIC.HelperFallback: Lazy Music: the helper is not running — playing via YouTube directly (players on VPN may hit error 150). Launch Foundry via the "Foundry VTT (with music)" shortcut.
LAZYMUSIC.AllTracksBlocked: ⛔ All tracks in this playlist are unavailable. YouTube blocks embedding. Try another playlist.
LAZYMUSIC.CacheOpened: Lazy Music: downloaded tracks folder opened.
LAZYMUSIC.HelperDownOpen: Lazy Music: the helper is not running, so the folder could not be opened. Launch Foundry via the "Foundry VTT (with music)" shortcut.
